response.justification: 15+ years of full-stack experience with a strong match on the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq. Background spans backend, frontend, DevOps, and architecture, with demonstrated ownership across multiple senior roles and a clear craftsmanship focus (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development).
strengths: Strong TypeScript/Node.js/React experience across multiple senior roles
Direct AI-agent and MCP development experience at current role
Demonstrated software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, testing focus
concerns: Limited evidence of Kotlin/Java in recent roles (mostly older robotics work)
MongoDB-heavy; less recent PostgreSQL/relational DB exposure shown
